character.name: Ancient (Corin replacement)
character.prompt: a non-human ancient celestial being, one of the first race the god made before humankind, an eldritch angel: an elegant tall feminine gothic sorceress silhouette fused with a caped dark mage, pale otherworldly grey-violet skin, glowing eyes, long ornate dark braided hair with ritual pins, a high-collared flowing dark cape and layered gothic gown, subtle non-human features (elongated limbs, faint halo of runes), solemn and regal and inhuman, no weapon in hand, empty hands, GBA-era 16-bit pixel art, dark single-color outline, bruise-violet and charcoal palette, cold moonlight, grim dark fantasy
